meaning: n.合成气(指用煤等做原料制成的一氧化碳和氢的混合物)
examples: With suitable catalysts, syngas can be turned into fuel.
The syngas can be converted into a number of different chemicals or even liquid fuel.
The hitch is that syngas from waste is full of tarry residue that tends to gum up the turbine.
To convert syngas into methane takes three more processes that consume yet more energy.
Even then the resulting syngas can be used only in a nearby power plant.
